description: Self-bot scripts and automation tools for personal Discord accounts.

products.name: AutoResponder
products.description: Automated response system with keyword triggers and custom replies.

products.name: StatusRotator
products.description: Cycle through custom status messages with timing and randomization.

products.name: GhostTyper
products.description: Simulate typing indicators with custom messages and scheduling.

products.name: FriendManager
products.description: Automated friend request management with filtering and notes.
